headline: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Fall As South Korea Eyes Excess AI Profits; CPI Inflation Due
summary: Techs fell as South Korea's Kospi index as a top official suggested excess AI profits could be given to citizens. The CPI inflation report is on tap.

headline: These 2 U.S. retail companies are most likely to beat consensus in Q1: Bernstien
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein named two U.S. retailers it believes are most likely to beat Wall Street consensus estimates in the first quarter, in a note on Tuesday, though the bank cautioned that the outlook for the rest of the year may matter more to investors than the headline results.

headline: Amazon offering a new 30-minute delivery space
summary: Amazon (AMZN) is launching 30-minute deliveries throughout US cities as part of its Prime Now service, with plans to make this available in most areas 24 hours a day.  Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses this new service and what it means for the broader express delivery space, especially as more companies employ the use of delivery robots.

content.title: Amazon offering a new 30-minute delivery space
content.description:
Amazon (AMZN) is launching 30-minute deliveries throughout US cities as part of its Prime Now service, with plans to make this available in most areas 24 hours a day.

Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses this new service and what it means for the broader express delivery space, especially as more companies employ the use of delivery robots.
content.summary: Amazon (AMZN) is launching 30-minute deliveries throughout US cities as part of its Prime Now service, with plans to make this available in most areas 24 hours a day.  Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses this new service and what it means for the broader express delivery space, especially as more companies employ the use of delivery robots.

headline: Target Onside Partnership Puts Men’s Wellness And Valuation In Focus
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) is launching an exclusive nationwide partnership with Onside, a new men's personal care brand. Onside products will roll out across Target stores and online, expanding the retailer's men's wellness and self-care offerings. The move adds a premium but accessible line aimed at attracting shoppers looking for men's grooming and wellness products. Target, trading at $121.8, has seen the stock rise 21.2% year to date and 29.8% over the past year. Returns over 3 and 5 years show...
